case_title: LEUNG, JOSEPH VS GRIMES, KATHERINE S.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,282.30 FILED BY LEUNG, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT GRIMES, KATHERINE S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-1998 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GRIMES, KATHERINE S.
